title: pelargonium × retirugum
intro: Pelargonium × retirugum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium graveloens and Pelargonium capitatum. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and stress, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce anxiety. Rose Geranium can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
